notes: Clear overhead view of house, lot, driveway/yard context; z20 is closer but partly tight, z19 best balances detail and full parcel context.
House and surrounding yard/lot are visible with good neighborhood context; z20 is usable but cropped/tight.
Townhouse/row-home setting visible with frontage, building footprint, and limited rear/side context; z19 gives best lot context.
Useful view of house and immediate lot context, though shadows/trees and dense surroundings reduce clarity; z19 preferable to tight z20.
House, driveway, and lot edge are visible; some shadow and tight neighboring structures limit backyard clarity. z19 best overall.
Clear overhead view; z19 shows house, driveway, yard/lot context together. z20 closer but slightly cropped/blurrier.
Good top-down view of house/structure area and surrounding lot; z19 balances detail and context. z18 adds river/neighborhood context.
Property is heavily obscured by trees/shadows; house and backyard/lot boundaries are difficult to discern at all zooms.
Usable neighborhood/lot view; z19 shows house and yard context, though the crosshair appears near street/edge and z20 is partly cropped.
z20 unavailable, but z19 provides a usable elevated view of the home/lot area among trees; partial obstruction from vegetation.
z20 has no imagery; z19/z18 are heavily tree-covered and do not clearly show house/backyard or lot boundaries.
Clear overhead of cul-de-sac and surrounding lots, but the marked location appears vacant/roadside and does not show a house with backyard/lot together.
Good elevated view showing house, lot context, street access, and nearby lake; z18 gives broader neighborhood/water context.
Clear view of house, yard/lot, street frontage, and treed rear area; z20 is closer but less contextual.
Imagery shows a vacant or construction-like site near road/open land, but no clear completed house plus backyard/lot together.
House and lot context visible, but significant tree shadow/cover obscures parts of backyard.
z20 unavailable; z19/z18 show wooded residential area but structure/lot are heavily obscured by trees.
Clear overhead view of house, backyard/lot, driveway, and surrounding parcels.
House and lot/backyard visible with good neighborhood context; minor tree shadow.
Good view of house, yard, driveway, and lot boundaries; z20 also usable but tighter.
